boarding_options.name: Indoor Stall Flex Plan
boarding_options.description: Standard 10x12 indoor stall with daily turnout, full use of arenas, and blanketing as needed. Ideal for owners wanting maximum flexibility.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Daily stall cleaning, twice-daily feeding, hay, daily group turnout, blanketing in season, basic scheduling for farrier and vet.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Use of indoor and outdoor arenas during posted hours, heated viewing room, tack lockers, grooming bays, hot/cold wash rack.

boarding_options.name: Indoor Stall Standard
boarding_options.description: Comfortable indoor stall with daily group turnout and full basic care on a short 3-month contract.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Daily stall cleaning, twice-daily grain, free-choice hay, daily group turnout, feed and supplement administration.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Indoor arena, outdoor sand arena, round pen, heated lounge, tack room storage.

boarding_options.name: Indoor Premium Care
boarding_options.description: Premium indoor stall package with individualized turnout and customized feeding program.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Twice-daily stall cleaning, three feedings per day as needed, individualized turnout, blanketing, medical monitoring, supplement administration.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Priority indoor arena access, heated wash stall, large tack locker, laundry for saddle pads and wraps.

boarding_options.name: Indoor Value Annual
boarding_options.description: Budget-friendly annual indoor stall contract with partial turnout schedule.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Stall cleaning once daily, twice-daily feeding, 4 days/week turnout, blanketing available for an additional monthly fee.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Indoor arena, outdoor arena, tack room, trailer parking.

boarding_options.name: Outdoor Paddock with Shelter
boarding_options.description: Shared outdoor paddock with run-in shelter and partial turnout schedule.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Daily checks, hay fed 2–3 times/day as seasonally appropriate, grain fed once daily, shelter access.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Outdoor arena, round pen, trail access, shared tack room.

boarding_options.name: Pasture Board Basic
boarding_options.description: Herd pasture board with natural shelter and seasonal hay.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Daily herd check, free-choice pasture or hay, mineral blocks, blanketing available for an extra fee.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Outdoor arena access, round pen, trails, tack storage.

boarding_options.name: Outdoor Stall with Run
boarding_options.description: Covered outdoor stall with attached run and partial turnout schedule.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Daily cleaning, twice-daily feeding, 3 days/week turnout, blanketing in winter.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Outdoor arena, round pen, wash rack, shared tack room.

boarding_options.name: Pasture Economy Month-to-Month
boarding_options.description: Flexible month-to-month pasture board with large group turnout.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Daily herd checks, seasonal hay, access to shelter and water, mineral blocks.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Outdoor arena during non-lesson hours, trail system, tack shed.

boarding_options.name: Indoor Training Board
boarding_options.description: Indoor stall including 3 professional training rides per week and daily turnout.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: All standard indoor care plus 3 training rides or lessons per week, grooming, tack cleaning twice weekly.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Priority arena scheduling, grooming stalls, wash rack, heated lounge.

boarding_options.name: Retirement Pasture Care
boarding_options.description: Dedicated retirement pasture with small herd and close monitoring.
boarding_options.servicesIncluded: Daily wellness checks, blanketing, feeding of senior feed and supplements, coordination of vet and farrier.
boarding_options.facilitiesIncluded: Quiet pasture area, limited arena use, secure tack storage.

camp_sessions.name: July Beginner Riding Camp Week 1 (Full Day, Ages 10–13)
camp_sessions.description: A full-day introductory riding camp focused on safety, grooming, and basic walk-trot skills for new riders.

camp_sessions.name: July Beginner Riding Camp Week 2 (Full Day, Ages 10–13)
camp_sessions.description: Second session of full-day beginner camp in July with daily riding, games, and horse care lessons.

camp_sessions.name: July Intermediate Jumping Camp (Half Day, Teens 13–17)
camp_sessions.description: Afternoon jumping-focused camp for confident walk-trot-canter riders.

camp_sessions.name: July Young Rider Adventure Camp (Half Day, Ages 8–12)
camp_sessions.description: Morning camp introducing younger riders to horses through games and basic riding.

camp_sessions.name: June Horsemanship Essentials Camp (Full Day, All Levels)
camp_sessions.description: Full-day program combining riding lessons with groundwork and stable management.

camp_sessions.name: Overnight Trail Adventure Camp (Teens 13–17)
camp_sessions.description: Four-night immersive camp featuring daily trail rides, camping, and horsemanship workshops.

camp_sessions.name: Spring Break Pony Camp (Half Day, Ages 8–12)
camp_sessions.description: School break camp focused on ponies, stable chores, and fun mounted games.

camp_sessions.name: Spring Break Riding Intensive (Full Day, Ages 10–13)
camp_sessions.description: Full-day camp for riders ready to spend more time in the saddle and barn.

camp_sessions.name: August Beginner Horse Camp (Full Day, Ages 8–12)
camp_sessions.description: End-of-summer full-day camp, perfect for brand new riders building confidence.

events.name: Family Fun Day & Barn Open House
events.description: Tour the facility, meet the school horses, watch demo rides, and enjoy family-friendly activities.

events.name: Spring Schooling Show
events.description: Low-key schooling show with walk-trot through 2'6" classes, great for first-time competitors.
events.location: Outdoor Arena (weather permitting) or Indoor Arena

events.name: Easter Egg Ride & Hunt
events.description: Mounted and on-foot egg hunt around the property, followed by hot cocoa in the lounge.

events.name: Spring Flatwork Tune-Up Clinic
events.description: Intensive flatwork clinic focusing on balance, rhythm, and suppleness for all disciplines.

events.name: Community Tack Sale & Swap
events.description: Buy, sell, or swap used tack and apparel; proceeds support lesson horse care.

events.name: Summer Show Series: Round 1
events.description: First show in our summer series featuring hunter, jumper, and equitation divisions.

events.name: Members-Only Summer Kickoff BBQ
events.description: Casual BBQ and barn games for club members and their families.

events.name: New Year Barn Party
events.description: Celebration to ring in the new year with boarders, riders, and staff.

events.name: Charity Trail Ride for Rescue Horses
events.description: Guided trail ride and picnic with proceeds benefiting local horse rescues.

events.name: Winter Jumping Warm-Up Clinic
events.description: Pre-season jumping clinic that was cancelled due to severe weather.

facility_packages.name: Indoor Arena + Party Room Weekend Package (2 Hours)
facility_packages.description: Two-hour private rental of the indoor arena plus adjacent heated party room, ideal for birthdays and group events.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Exclusive use of indoor riding arena and upstairs party/viewing room with tables and seating for up to 20 guests.
facility_packages.notes: Helmets required for all mounted guests. Staff supervisor included.

facility_packages.name: Indoor Arena + Party Room Weekday Special
facility_packages.description: Discounted weekday afternoon rental of indoor arena and party room.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Indoor arena and party room with basic decorations and sound system.

facility_packages.name: Indoor Arena Practice Block
facility_packages.description: Two-hour private access to the indoor arena for schooling or small group practice.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Indoor arena with standard jump set available on request.
facility_packages.notes: Instructor or insured trainer required for jumping.

facility_packages.name: Party Room Only Rental (3 Hours)
facility_packages.description: Use the upstairs party room for meetings or celebrations overlooking the indoor arena.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Heated party room with kitchenette, tables, and chairs.
facility_packages.notes: No horse access included; add-on barn tour available.

facility_packages.name: Outdoor Arena + Party Room Summer Package
facility_packages.description: Warm-weather package pairing the outdoor arena with the party room for riding parties.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Outdoor sand arena and nearby party pavilion with picnic tables.
facility_packages.notes: Weather-dependent; rain backup may use indoor arena if available.

facility_packages.name: Entire Facility Rental (Half Day)
facility_packages.description: Reserve the entire riding center for horse shows or large private events.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Indoor and outdoor arenas, warm-up ring, viewing room, and barn aisle for vendors.
facility_packages.notes: Insurance and security deposit required. Custom schedule arranged with management.

facility_packages.name: Outdoor Arena Schooling Session
facility_packages.description: Private schooling time in the outdoor arena outside of lesson hours.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Outdoor sand arena with dressage letters or low jumps available.
facility_packages.notes: Available spring through fall, weather permitting.

facility_packages.name: Holiday Barn Party Package
facility_packages.description: Evening facility rental for holiday-themed events with horses and carriage rides.
facility_packages.includedSpacesDescription: Indoor arena, party room, and courtyard with optional carriage rides.

instructors.name: Emma Jones
instructors.bio: Emma specializes in developing confident jumpers from crossrails through 3'. She focuses on position, rhythm, and safe, positive experiences over fences.

instructors.name: Luis Martinez
instructors.bio: USDF bronze medalist with a passion for correct basics, Luis teaches riders of all levels to communicate softly and effectively with their horses.

instructors.name: Ava Nguyen
instructors.bio: Ava leads many of our beginner and children’s programs, emphasizing safety, clear communication, and building trust between horse and rider.

instructors.name: Daniel Kim
instructors.bio: Daniel coaches intermediate riders moving into jumper and equitation divisions, with an analytical approach to course strategy.

instructors.name: Sophia Rivera
instructors.bio: Sophia guides riders through trail and obstacle work, helping them build confidence outside the arena.

instructors.name: Mark Thompson
instructors.bio: Mark focuses on groundwork and horsemanship, teaching riders how to handle and understand horses safely from the ground up.

membership_plans.name: Adult Flex Rider
membership_plans.description: Flexible plan for adult riders taking a couple of lessons per month with access to open arena times.
membership_plans.highlights: 2 group lessons per month, weekend arena access during open ride hours, member event discounts.

membership_plans.name: Adult Lesson Plus
membership_plans.description: Best for riders in regular training who want weekly lessons and full facility access.
membership_plans.highlights: 4 group or semi-private lessons per month, weekend arena access, discounted clinic entry fees.

membership_plans.name: Adult Weekday Rider
membership_plans.description: Budget plan for riders who can ride on weekdays only.
membership_plans.highlights: 2 weekday lessons per month, weekday daytime arena access.

membership_plans.name: Adult Unlimited Training
membership_plans.description: For serious riders in a structured training program with multiple weekly lessons.
membership_plans.highlights: Up to 8 lessons per month, priority scheduling, full facility access.

membership_plans.name: Youth Rider Basic
membership_plans.description: Introductory membership for youth riders in middle and high school.
membership_plans.highlights: 2 group lessons per month, access to select youth events.

membership_plans.name: Child Starter Plan
membership_plans.description: Perfect for young beginners just starting their riding journey.
membership_plans.highlights: 2 leadline or beginner lessons per month, parent viewing lounge access.

membership_plans.name: Family Rider Bundle
membership_plans.description: Shared family plan for up to 3 immediate family members.
membership_plans.highlights: 6 lessons per month shared among family, weekend arena access, family event nights.

membership_plans.name: Senior Leisure Rider
membership_plans.description: Reduced-rate plan for riders 60+ focusing on gentle, low-impact riding.
membership_plans.highlights: 2 small-group lessons per month, quiet ride times, weekend access.

membership_plans.name: Adult Arena Access Only
membership_plans.description: For experienced riders with their own horses boarding elsewhere who want arena time only.
membership_plans.highlights: Unlimited open arena rides during posted hours, no lessons included.

membership_plans.name: Youth Competitive Team
membership_plans.description: Designed for youth riders competing at local and regional shows.
membership_plans.highlights: 6 lessons per month, coaching at select shows, practice rides on weekends.

safety_gear_items.name: ASTM/SEI-Certified Riding Helmet
safety_gear_items.description: Properly fitted, current-standard riding helmet worn at all times while mounted or handling horses in the arena.

safety_gear_items.name: Riding Boots with Defined Heel
safety_gear_items.description: Paddock or tall boots with a smooth sole and heel of at least 1 inch to prevent the foot from slipping through the stirrup.

safety_gear_items.name: Long Riding Pants or Breeches
safety_gear_items.description: Snug, non-slippery long pants or breeches to protect the rider’s legs from rubs and pinches.

safety_gear_items.name: Riding Gloves with Grip
safety_gear_items.description: Gloves that provide good rein grip and protect hands from blisters and rope burns.

safety_gear_items.name: Equestrian Body Protector
safety_gear_items.description: Protective vest meeting current safety standards, strongly encouraged for jumping and required for cross-country.

safety_gear_items.name: Closed-Toe Hard-Soled Shoes for Ground Work
safety_gear_items.description: Sturdy shoes or boots worn when leading, grooming, or working around horses.

safety_gear_items.name: Shirt with Sleeves
safety_gear_items.description: Short- or long-sleeved shirt that covers the shoulders to prevent saddle rubs and sunburn.

safety_gear_items.name: Reflective Gear for Low-Light Riding
safety_gear_items.description: Reflective vest or bands worn when riding outdoors near dusk or dawn.

safety_gear_items.name: Hair Contained Above Collar
safety_gear_items.description: Long hair secured in a low ponytail or tucked under helmet to avoid obstructed vision or entanglement.

safety_gear_items.name: Safety Stirrups or Toe Stoppers
safety_gear_items.description: Stirrups designed to reduce the risk of the foot being caught during a fall.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Weekday Evening Horse Grooming Crew (Tuesday)
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist staff with bringing horses in, grooming, and preparing lesson horses for evening classes.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Weekday Evening Horse Grooming Crew (Thursday)
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help groom and tack lesson horses, refill water buckets, and tidy grooming areas.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Saturday Morning Barn Chores
volunteer_opportunities.description: Support staff with stall cleaning, sweeping aisles, and refilling water troughs.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Spring Schooling Show Event Staff
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist with check-in, gate duties, and arena resetting during the schooling show.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Office Admin & Filing (Wednesday Afternoons)
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help the office team with filing, data entry, and preparing lesson packets.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Therapeutic Lesson Sidewalker (Monday)
volunteer_opportunities.description: Walk alongside therapeutic riders, helping to support balance and communication per instructor guidance.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Weekend Horse Grooming & Turnout (Sunday)
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist with grooming, blanketing, and turning horses out or bringing them in on Sundays.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Weekday Morning Barn Support
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help with feeding, sweeping, and basic barn upkeep on quiet weekday mornings.

volunteer_opportunities.name: Charity Trail Ride Support Crew
volunteer_opportunities.description: Assist with registration, parking, and trail checkpoints during the charity trail ride.

clinics.name: Intermediate Jumper Tune-Up Clinic
clinics.description: A focused intermediate-level jumping clinic covering track, pace, and related distances over courses up to 2'9".

clinics.name: Intermediate Jumper Skills on a Budget
clinics.description: Cost-conscious clinic for intermediate riders working on jump-off turns, lines, and course efficiency over fences up to 2'6".

clinics.name: Beginner Crossrails Confidence Clinic
clinics.description: Introductory jumping clinic for riders new to fences, focusing on position, poles, and small crossrails.

clinics.name: Advanced Jumper Course Strategy Clinic
clinics.description: For experienced riders schooling 3' and above, emphasizing walk course strategy, lines, and rideability.

clinics.name: Flatwork Foundations for Jumpers & Dressage
clinics.description: All-level flatwork clinic improving rhythm, balance, and straightness to support any riding discipline.

clinics.name: Intro to Dressage Basics
clinics.description: Beginner clinic introducing dressage letters, basic geometry, and correct aids at walk and trot.

clinics.name: Confidence on the Trail Clinic
clinics.description: Build confidence riding outside the arena with a focus on obstacles, hills, and group trail etiquette.

clinics.name: Horsemanship & Groundwork Essentials
clinics.description: Unmounted clinic focusing on leading, lunging, and reading equine body language for safer handling.

clinics.name: Confident Adult Beginner Rider Clinic
clinics.description: Supportive clinic for adult beginners focusing on mounting, steering, and safe transitions at the walk and trot.

clinics.name: Winter Intermediate Jump Gymnastics Clinic
clinics.description: A past intermediate gymnastic lines clinic retained for reference; not currently open for registration.

lessons.name: Saturday Kids Beginner Group (Ages 8–12)
lessons.description: Weekly beginner group lesson introducing safe handling, basic position, and walk–trot skills for riders ages 8–12.

lessons.name: Wednesday After-School Beginner Group (Ages 8–12)
lessons.description: After-school beginner group focusing on building confidence at the walk and trot with games and simple patterns.

lessons.name: Saturday Kids Semi-Private Beginner (Ages 8–12)
lessons.description: Semi-private format for 2–3 beginner riders wanting extra attention on Saturdays.

lessons.name: Tween Beginner Riding Program (Ages 10–13)
lessons.description: A structured 8-week program for tweens new to riding, combining weekly mounted lessons and horsemanship homework.

lessons.name: Teen Intermediate Jumping Group (Fridays)
lessons.description: Weekly group for confident teen riders schooling small courses and gymnastic exercises.

lessons.name: Adult Beginner Group (Tuesday Evenings)
lessons.description: Supportive group for adult riders learning the basics or returning after time away from the saddle.

lessons.name: Adult Intermediate Jump Group (Sundays)
lessons.description: Adult group for riders schooling 2'–2'6" courses and working on rideability between fences.

lessons.name: Adult Dressage Basics Group (Thursdays)
lessons.description: Adult flatwork group concentrating on rhythm, relaxation, and correct figures at walk and trot.

lessons.name: All-Ages Intro to Trail Riding
lessons.description: Four-week program introducing riders and their mounts to safe trail riding outside the arena.

lessons.name: All-Ages Horsemanship & Groundwork
lessons.description: Unmounted program teaching safe leading, grooming, tying, and groundwork skills for riders of all levels.

lessons.name: Teen Advanced Jumper Group (Wednesdays)
lessons.description: Advanced teen group for riders schooling technical courses and preparing for rated shows.

lessons.name: Tween Riding Confidence Program (Ages 10–13)
lessons.description: Six-week program for 10–13 year-olds focusing on confidence, balance, and barn safety.

lessons.name: Adult Morning Walk–Trot Lesson (Fridays)
lessons.description: Quiet-morning group for adult riders comfortable at the walk and learning to trot independently.
